home.title: Math Playground
home.subtitle: Interactive math lessons for everyone
home.primaryDesc: Grades 4-8 • Geometry, fractions, equations and more
home.highschoolDesc: Grades 9-12 • Functions, trigonometry, calculus and more

areas.title: Areas of Shapes
areas.description: Learn to calculate areas of squares, rectangles, triangles, diamonds and trapezoids

decimals.title: Decimal Fractions
decimals.description: Learn place value, comparing, and adding/subtracting decimal numbers

areas.title: Areas of Shapes
areas.intro: Explore how to calculate areas of basic geometric shapes. Drag the sliders to change dimensions and see how the area changes!
areas.quizDesc: Calculate the area or missing dimension for each shape

hints.locked: Answer incorrectly {count} more time(s) to unlock hint

games.shapeBuilderDesc: Build a shape with the target area by adjusting dimensions
games.findDimensions: Find dimensions that give this area
games.wellDone: Well done! You found valid dimensions!
games.detectiveDesc: Find the missing dimension using the given clue
games.matchPairsDesc: Match each shape with its correct area
games.matchPairsUnitsDesc: Match equivalent areas in different units — watch out, the numbers look similar!

auth.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

decimals.title: Decimal Fractions
decimals.intro: Explore how decimal fractions work! Decimals are another way to write fractions — 0.5 is the same as ½. Use the sliders to see how each digit contributes to the number.
decimals.numberLineIntro: See where decimals live between whole numbers. Pick any decimal and zoom in to see tenths and hundredths appear!
decimals.zoomHint: Zoom in to see smaller divisions between numbers
decimals.addSubIntro: See how decimal addition and subtraction work step by step. Pick two numbers and watch the calculation unfold!
decimals.placementDesc: Place the decimal at the correct position on the number line
decimals.placeOnLine: Place this number on the line:
decimals.comparisonDesc: Which decimal is bigger? Watch out for tricky ones!
decimals.whichIsBigger: Tap the bigger number (or = if equal)
decimals.calculatorDesc: Solve addition and subtraction problems with decimals
decimals.matchDesc: Match each fraction with its decimal equivalent
